regulations.title: Enlisted Promotions and Demotions
regulations.purpose: This regulation prescribes enlisted promotion and demotion (previously known as reduction) functions. It is linked to the AR 600 - 8 series and provides principles of support, standards of service, policies, tasks, rules, and steps governing all work required to support promotions and demotions.
